data.body: DONE. Split tests/interfaces (41 files, over the 24 hard cap) via git mv into 5 seam subdirs: facades/(8), contracts/(6), lifecycle/(7), queries/(9), store/(11) — all within 6-12. conftest.py + adapters.py kept at interfaces root. Import safety: conftest sys.path-inserts its own dir so 'from adapters import' resolves from subdirs (6 sites); facades/test_cli_argparse.py uses _engine_path.repo_root() for golden path. Reviewer caught a real functional miss: [tool.mutmut] test-selection paths (+ docs) still pointed at old flat paths — repointed all 8 to new subdirs (a mutmut run would otherwise select zero tests for the cores); also fixed stale path refs in docs/{mutation-testing,exit-codes,event-schema,output-schemas,coverage,remediation-implementation-plan}.md. Verified: broad 1759 passed (same count, nothing un-collected) + integration 15; order-independent across pytest-randomly seeds 1234/9999 + no:randomly (identical 510); ruff clean; history preserved (git mv). Opus implementer + separate opus reviewer (APPROVE-WITH-NITS, all addressed). Commit 7a7a4393.
